TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Pinsbkan Pinsbkan ga, kinhulan ta' ita' Tayal. minpsgagay kya Pinsbkan qu binkisan ta ita' Tayal hiya ma. ywaw kinhulan ita Tayal, minnaki ta squ qalang na Stbwan, nyux mha sqaniy minniru mha: minnaki ta rhiyal m'ma na Stbwan, Pinsbkan son nha smi lalu, puqing ke na Tayal ga,"bnka btunux", wiwan nqu rhiyal na utux bnkis. Sraral ga, maki sqaniy qutux hupa balay na btunux, si tbah mcka qutux ryax, kahul ska na btunux, mhtuw qutux mlikuy ru qutux kneril, nanu hga puqing 'ringan balay bnkis ta. Sazing hga qaniy msqun ru mbhuyaw m'laqi, smbil maki squ rgyax ga, llaqi na Tayal, taqu mbiyaq mwah te hugal ga, llaqi na binah Tayal. Kyalaw simu loziy sazing na ywaw pinqywan, nyux mha sqaniy minniru nya: rgyax na Papak Waqa cyux maki squ te htgan wagi na qalang S'uraw qmapah squ llyung na Mknazi. Maki squ sinbilan ke mha: obeh tehuk b'bu na rgyax Papak waqa, cyux mhtuw kya qutux btunux, cyux tlqing kya qutux mlikuy ru qutux kneril, nanu qu cyaqung ki siliq, qutux qutux ryax mwah pzimu sqaniy aki mhtuw squliq qaniy. Maki qutux ryax, mhtuw balay squliq la, mhtuw qutux mlikuy ru qutux kneril, msqun sazing hga, mbhuyaw m'laqi, tehuk soni kya pira kbhul kawas wayal, nanu qaniy qu kwara llaqi Tayal na sinbilan. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' 陳和平,Hetay‧Hayung
S.PHON: pins~ɕβkan pins~ɕβkan ɣa, kinħulan taʔ itaʔ tajal. minps~ɕɣaɣaj kja pins~ɕβkan qu βinkis~ɕan ta itaʔ tajal ħija ma. jwaw kinħulan ita tajal, minnaki ta s~ɕqu qalaŋ na s~ɕtβwan, njux mħa s~ɕqanij minniru mħa: minnaki ta rħijal mʔma na s~ɕtβwan, pins~ɕβkan s~ɕon nħa s~ɕmi lalu, puqiŋ ke na tajal ɣa,"βnka βtunux", wiwan nqu rħijal na utux βnkis~ɕ. s~ɕraral ɣa, maki s~ɕqanij qutux ħupa βalaj na βtunux, s~ɕi tβaħ mʦ~ʨka qutux rjax, kaħul s~ɕka na βtunux, mħtuw qutux mlikuj ru qutux kneril, nanu ħɣa puqiŋ ʔriŋan βalaj βnkis~ɕ ta. s~ɕaziŋ ħɣa qanij ms~ɕqun ru mβħujaw mʔlaqi, s~ɕmβil maki s~ɕqu rɣjax ɣa, llaqi na tajal, taqu mβijaq mwaħ te ħuɣal ɣa, llaqi na βinaħ tajal. kjalaw s~ɕimu lozij s~ɕaziŋ na jwaw pinqjwan, njux mħa s~ɕqanij minniru nja: rɣjax na papak waqa ʦ~ʨjux maki s~ɕqu te ħtɣan waɣi na qalaŋ s~ɕʔuraw qmapaħ s~ɕqu lljuŋ na mknazi. maki s~ɕqu s~ɕinβilan ke mħa: oβeħ teħuk βʔβu na rɣjax papak waqa, ʦ~ʨjux mħtuw kja qutux βtunux, ʦ~ʨjux tlqiŋ kja qutux mlikuj ru qutux kneril, nanu qu ʦ~ʨjaquŋ ki s~ɕiliq, qutux qutux rjax mwaħ pzimu s~ɕqanij aki mħtuw s~ɕquliq qanij. maki qutux rjax, mħtuw βalaj s~ɕquliq la, mħtuw qutux mlikuj ru qutux kneril, ms~ɕqun s~ɕaziŋ ħɣa, mβħujaw mʔlaqi, teħuk s~ɕoni kja pira kβħul kawas~ɕ wajal, nanu qanij qu kwara llaqi tajal na s~ɕinβilan. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ***,ħetaj*ħajuŋ
S.FORM: Pinsbkan Pinsbkan ga, kinhulan ta' ita' Tayal. minpsgagay kya Pinsbkan qu binkisan ta ita' Tayal hiya ma. ywaw kinhulan ita Tayal, minnaki ta squ qalang na Stbwan, nyux mha sqaniy minniru mha: minnaki ta rhiyal m'ma na Stbwan, Pinsbkan son nha smi lalu, puqing ke na Tayal ga,"bnka btunux", wiwan nqu rhiyal na utux bnkis. Sraral ga, maki sqaniy qutux hupa balay na btunux, si tbah mcka qutux ryax, kahul ska na btunux, mhtuw qutux mlikuy ru qutux kneril, nanu hga puqing 'ringan balay bnkis ta. Sazing hga qaniy msqun ru mbhuyaw m'laqi, smbil maki squ rgyax ga, llaqi na Tayal, taqu mbiyaq mwah te hugal ga, llaqi na binah Tayal. Kyalaw simu loziy sazing na ywaw pinqywan, nyux mha sqaniy minniru nya: rgyax na Papak Waqa cyux maki squ te htgan wagi na qalang S'uraw qmapah squ llyung na Mknazi. Maki squ sinbilan ke mha: obeh tehuk b'bu na rgyax Papak waqa, cyux mhtuw kya qutux btunux, cyux tlqing kya qutux mlikuy ru qutux kneril, nanu qu cyaqung ki siliq, qutux qutux ryax mwah pzimu sqaniy aki mhtuw squliq qaniy. Maki qutux ryax, mhtuw balay squliq la, mhtuw qutux mlikuy ru qutux kneril, msqun sazing hga, mbhuyaw m'laqi, tehuk soni kya pira kbhul kawas wayal, nanu qaniy qu kwara llaqi Tayal na sinbilan. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' 陳和平,Hetay‧Hayung
S.PHON: pins~ɕβkan pins~ɕβkan ɣa, kinħulan taʔ itaʔ tajal. minps~ɕɣaɣaj kja pins~ɕβkan qu βinkis~ɕan ta itaʔ tajal ħija ma. jwaw kinħulan ita tajal, minnaki ta s~ɕqu qalaŋ na s~ɕtβwan, njux mħa s~ɕqanij minniru mħa: minnaki ta rħijal mʔma na s~ɕtβwan, pins~ɕβkan s~ɕon nħa s~ɕmi lalu, puqiŋ ke na tajal ɣa,"βnka βtunux", wiwan nqu rħijal na utux βnkis~ɕ. s~ɕraral ɣa, maki s~ɕqanij qutux ħupa βalaj na βtunux, s~ɕi tβaħ mʦ~ʨka qutux rjax, kaħul s~ɕka na βtunux, mħtuw qutux mlikuj ru qutux kneril, nanu ħɣa puqiŋ ʔriŋan βalaj βnkis~ɕ ta. s~ɕaziŋ ħɣa qanij ms~ɕqun ru mβħujaw mʔlaqi, s~ɕmβil maki s~ɕqu rɣjax ɣa, llaqi na tajal, taqu mβijaq mwaħ te ħuɣal ɣa, llaqi na βinaħ tajal. kjalaw s~ɕimu lozij s~ɕaziŋ na jwaw pinqjwan, njux mħa s~ɕqanij minniru nja: rɣjax na papak waqa ʦ~ʨjux maki s~ɕqu te ħtɣan waɣi na qalaŋ s~ɕʔuraw qmapaħ s~ɕqu lljuŋ na mknazi. maki s~ɕqu s~ɕinβilan ke mħa: oβeħ teħuk βʔβu na rɣjax papak waqa, ʦ~ʨjux mħtuw kja qutux βtunux, ʦ~ʨjux tlqiŋ kja qutux mlikuj ru qutux kneril, nanu qu ʦ~ʨjaquŋ ki s~ɕiliq, qutux qutux rjax mwaħ pzimu s~ɕqanij aki mħtuw s~ɕquliq qanij. maki qutux rjax, mħtuw βalaj s~ɕquliq la, mħtuw qutux mlikuj ru qutux kneril, ms~ɕqun s~ɕaziŋ ħɣa, mβħujaw mʔlaqi, teħuk s~ɕoni kja pira kβħul kawas~ɕ wajal, nanu qanij qu kwara llaqi tajal na s~ɕinβilan. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ***,ħetaj*ħajuŋ
